was a member of the Dissidence Movement.

Story

Dissidence Movement arc

At the start of the Dissidence Movement's rebellion within the Industrial City, August gives Januar the task of gathering 50 troops to lock down the main street of the city.

Trivia

Given how August, Juli, and Mai's names are based on the months of August, July, May, it can be said that Januar's name corresponds with the month of January.
